Second Account And Report Of Trustee And Petition For Its Settlement And For Allowance Of Attorney Fees And Costs, Trustee Fees Petition And Petition
Off Calendar Jun-10-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Jane Gordon for and with Paula Bibbs.

Ms. Gordon stated that bond was now secured/filed and that a refund on payment to the Referee has been requested. The matter was taken under submission with leaning toward some reduction in fees.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
